name: GNSSAddWpLine
title: GNSSAddWpLine
syntax: dword GNSSAddWpLine( double latitude1, double longitude1, double altitude1, double latitude2, double longitude2, double altitude2,dword straightLine)
description: This function can be used to describe a line. To do this, the points that describe the line are inserted at the end of the waypoint list.
The unit of the parameters altitude1 and altitude2 depends on the system of measurement units selected with the GNSSSetUnits function.

parameters.name: latitude1
parameters.description: latitude of the waypoint at the beginning of the line (in degrees)

parameters.name: longitude1
parameters.description: longitude of the waypoint at the beginning of the line (in degrees)

parameters.name: altitude1
parameters.description: altitude of the waypoint at the beginning of the line (in m or ft)

parameters.name: latitude2
parameters.description: latitude of the waypoint at the end of the line (in degrees)

parameters.name: longitude2
parameters.description: longitude of the waypoint at the end of the line (in degrees)

parameters.name: altitude2
parameters.description: altitude of the waypoint at the end of the line (in m or ft)

parameters.name: straightLine
parameters.description: 1 if the two points are connected by a straight line, otherwise 0

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
